name: Steep
description: Steep — SQL-first analytics platform for running ad-hoc queries and sharing dashboards from your data warehouse.

seo.title: Steep — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Steep: Steep — SQL-first analytics platform for running ad-hoc queries and sharing dashboards from your data warehouse.

when_to_use: SQL-first ad hoc analytics on data warehouse
Analyst-friendly query tool without BI complexity
Data exploration with warehouse-native SQL execution
Lightweight reporting for data-driven product teams

pros: SQL-first; power users stay in their comfort zone
Lightweight alternative to full BI suites
cons: Niche vendor competing with Hex, Mode, Preset
Not a product analytics tool; more exploratory BI
review.verdict: Pleasant SQL-first BI for warehouse-native teams; credible but crowded competition from bigger names.
review.best_for: Analysts and data teams who live in SQL and want quick dashboards off their warehouse.
review.not_for: Non-SQL users, packaged product analytics needs, or teams standardizing on Hex or Mode.
